after_value: In the circuit shown in the figure, the power supply voltage is \( u = 220\sqrt{2} \sin(628t) \, \text{V} \), and the readings of ammeters \( A_1 \), \( A_2 \), and \( A_3 \) are the same. before_value: The reading of \( A_1 \) is twice the reading of \( A_3 \)
after_value: The reading of \( A_1 \) is twice the reading of \( A_3 \)
